5.3.解决方案 请注意，我们将返回类型设置为 double 而不是 int：最大的 int 通常约为 2/9，并且阶乘函数不需要非常大的 n 即可大于该值。如果想要一个真正快速的阶乘函数，一个好的解决方案是创建一个类来存储从 0 到 69 的 n 值，然后简单地传回所请求的值。请注意，70 阶乘大于 1/100，因此它是一个合理的截止点，或者可以将缓存值计算到不会导致双精度浮点溢出的最大数字。以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 如何有效地计算二项式系数？ （帕斯卡三角形） e 您更喜欢递归还是循环？ e 哪个跑得更快？ e 斯特林公式是什么？ « 假设我们想要确切的答案，但它比最大的整数还要大，你会怎么做？氧

problems.titleEn: Question 5.14 - Search a row-and-column sorted matrix
problems.titleZh: 问题 5.14 - 搜索行列递增矩阵
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: You are given a matrix with the property that every row is increasing and every column is increasing. A number, x, is known to lie within the matrix, give an efficient algorithm to locate it.
problems.promptZh: 给定一个每行递增、每列也递增的矩阵。已知数字 x 在矩阵中，请给出一个高效算法定位它。
problems.answer: Start from the top-right corner. If the current value is larger than x, move left; if it is smaller, move down; if equal, return the position. The runtime is O(rows + columns).
problems.answerEn: Start from the top-right corner. If the current value is larger than x, move left; if it is smaller, move down; if equal, return the position. The runtime is O(rows + columns).
problems.answerZh: 从右上角开始。若当前值大于 x，就向左移动；若小于 x，就向下移动；若相等则返回位置。时间复杂度为 O(行数 + 列数)。
problems.manualContentReviewReason: Sorted-matrix search explanation had malformed loop code and inconsistent Chinese variable names.

problems.titleEn: Question 5.15 - Detect a duplicate in an array with values 0 to N-1
problems.titleZh: 问题 5.15 - 检测 0 到 N-1 数组中的重复值
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: A vector v of integers has N elements. Every element is in the (closed) range 0 to N - 1. Write an algorithm that determines whether any number is duplicated. You do not need to preserve the array. The algorithm can be sketched rather than written in code.
problems.promptZh: 一个整数向量 v 有 N 个元素，每个元素都在闭区间 0 到 N-1 内。写一个算法判断是否存在重复数字；不要求保留原数组。
problems.answer: Because every value is in 0..N-1 and the array may be modified, repeatedly move each value v to index v. If index v already contains v, then v is duplicated. This is O(N) time and O(1) extra space.
problems.answerEn: Because every value is in 0..N-1 and the array may be modified, repeatedly move each value v to index v. If index v already contains v, then v is duplicated. This is O(N) time and O(1) extra space.
problems.answerZh: 因为每个值都在 0..N-1 且允许修改数组，可以反复把值 v 放到下标 v 的位置。若下标 v 处已经是 v，则 v 出现重复。时间复杂度 O(N)，额外空间 O(1)。
problems.manualContentReviewReason: Duplicate-detection code had OCR errors such as broken indices and malformed loop conditions.

problems.titleEn: Question 5.16 - Linear interpolation
problems.titleZh: 问题 5.16 - 线性插值
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Write a routine to do linear interpolation.
problems.promptZh: 写一个线性插值例程。
problems.answer:
Find the two grid points $x_i\le x\le x_{i+1}$, then return
$$y_i+\frac{x-x_i}{x_{i+1}-x_i}(y_{i+1}-y_i).$$
Use binary search on the sorted x-grid for $O(\log n)$ lookup.
problems.answerEn:
Find the two grid points $x_i\le x\le x_{i+1}$, then return
$$y_i+\frac{x-x_i}{x_{i+1}-x_i}(y_{i+1}-y_i).$$
Use binary search on the sorted x-grid for $O(\log n)$ lookup.
problems.answerZh:
先找到两个网格点 $x_i\le x\le x_{i+1}$，然后返回
$$y_i+\frac{x-x_i}{x_{i+1}-x_i}(y_{i+1}-y_i).$$
若 x 网格已排序，可用二分搜索实现 $O(\log n)$ 查找。
problems.manualContentReviewReason: Linear-interpolation code had corrupted iterator operations and Chinese syntax.

problems.titleEn: Question 5.17 - A submarine starts at some point on the integer line; it moves a constant number of integers each turn
problems.titleZh: 问题 5.17 - 一艘潜艇从整数线上的某个点开始；它每转移动固定数量的整数
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: A submarine starts at some point on the integer line; it moves a constant number of integers each turn. Once a turn you can lob a missile at some point on the integer line. Can you give an algorithm that will hit the submarine in a finite number of turns?
problems.promptZh: 一艘潜艇从整数线上的某个点开始；它每转移动固定数量的整数。一旦转弯，您就可以在整数线上的某个点投掷导弹。你能给出一个在有限圈数内击中潜艇的算法吗？问题 5.18。两台机器人同时在整数线上跳伞。当他们着陆时，他们都会放下降落伞，然后执行你编写的代码。每个机器人必须具有相同的代码。每行代码执行需要一秒钟。每行代码可以表示 e Go 1 单位 left e Go |单位向右 e 转到第 XXX 行 e 如果您当前位置有降落伞，则转到第 XXX 行。编写代码使它们发生碰撞。问题 5.19。编写一个例程，对树节点中的数字求和。节点可以有两个分支、一个分支或没有分支。问题 5.20。假设时间 T 的股票价格为 N(100, 1)，您希望通过蒙特卡罗模拟对在 110 执行的数字看涨期权定价。如果你这样做会发生什么？改进方法。 5.3.解决方案
problems.explanation:
We first rephrase the question more mathematically. For some pair of integers a and b, the position after n turns is a+nb. The set of all possible pairs (a,b) is Z x Z which is a countable set. We can therefore find a sequence of pairs (a, bp.) which visit all the points on this set. (For example, go clockwise around squares centred at the origin.) Now suppose at time n, we lob a missile at An + nbn. If dn = a and 6,, = 6, then this will hit the submarine. Since we are trying all possible pairs, this will eventually happen. Here are some possible related questions: e What if a,b are required to be rationals but not integers?

e What if a, b are allowed to be reals but the missile has a blast radius of size ∈ > 0? O

problems.titleZh: 问题 5.18 - 两台机器人同时在整数线上跳伞
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers

problems.promptEn: Two robots are parachuted on the integer line at the same time. When they land, they each drop their parachutes, then execute the code programmed by you. Each robot must have identical code. Each line of code takes one second to execute. Each line of code can say e Go 1 unit left e Go | unit right e GOTO line XXX e If there is a parachute at your current location, GOTO line XXX. Write code to make them collide. QugEsTION 5.19. Write a routine that sums the numbers in the nodes of a tree. Nodes can have two branches, one, or none.
problems.promptZh: 两台机器人同时在整数线上跳伞。当他们着陆时，他们都会放下降落伞，然后执行你编写的代码。每个机器人必须具有相同的代码。每行代码执行需要一秒钟。每行代码可以表示 e Go 1 单位 left e Go |单位向右 e 转到第 XXX 行 e 如果您当前位置有降落伞，则转到第 XXX 行。编写代码使它们发生碰撞。问题 5.19。编写一个例程，对树节点中的数字求和。节点可以有两个分支、一个分支或没有分支。问题 5.20。假设时间 T 的股票价格为 N(100, 1)，您希望通过蒙特卡罗模拟对在 110 执行的数字看涨期权定价。如果你这样做会发生什么？改进方法。 5.3.解决方案
problems.explanation:
There are many variants of this floating around; it seems to be more popular in coding interviews, for example at Microsoft, than at quant interviews. It reputedly originated with the Israeli defense force. The idea here is to move slowly until you realize the other robot is ahead of you and then move quickly. We can go slowly by taking one step back for every two steps forward. We arbitrarily start by going left. 0 left 1 right 2 left 3 if (parachute) goto 5 4 goto 0 5 left 6 goto 5 Here are some possible related questions: e The code above assumes that the two robots have the same orientation, that is they agree on the leftwards direction. Is the problem solvable if they might not? e What if the robot's parachute lands separately? You can assume that its parachute is closer than the other robot and its parachute. e Is the two-dimensional analogue of this problem solvable? What about more than two dimensions? ® Relate this problem to testing a linked list to see if it contains any loops. O

problems.titleEn: Question 5.19 - Write a routine that sums the numbers in the nodes of a tree
problems.titleZh: 问题 5.19 - 编写一个例程，对树节点中的数字求和
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Write a routine that sums the numbers in the nodes of a tree. Nodes can have two branches, one, or none.
problems.promptZh: 编写一个例程，对树节点中的数字求和。节点可以有两个分支、一个分支或没有分支。问题 5.20。假设时间 T 的股票价格为 N(100, 1)，您希望通过蒙特卡罗模拟对在 110 执行的数字看涨期权定价。如果你这样做会发生什么？改进方法。 5.3.解决方案
problems.explanation:
The easiest way to do this is by recursion. Clearly, the solution will depend on how we represent the tree. One simple solution is that it is a collection of nodes which contain a piece of data, and pointers to two other nodes. If a node is not present then the pointer points to zero instead. Here is a typical header file for a tree node class \#ifndef TREE_NODE_H \#define TREE_NODE_H class TreeNode \{ public: TreeNode* Left; TreeNode* Right; double data; \}; double GetSum(const TreeNode& top); \#endif Note, however, that we would really need a lot of ancillary code to handle creation and destruction of nodes, but here we present a minimalist solution that would suffice for answering this question. Our solution does not handle the null case that the tree is empty, but that could be dealt with by having the tree live inside a class which takes care of emptiness. The easiest way to traverse the entire tree is to use recursion. The sum will be the value at the top plus the sum of the values for each of the two nodes below it if they exist. A simple solution is therefore:

double GetSum(const TreeNode& top) \{ double value = top.data; if (top.Left!=0) value += GetSum(*top.Left); if (top.Right!=0) value += GetSum(*top.Right); return value; \} Here are some possible related questions: e Modify the solution so it handles the empty case. e The solution above uses recursion, can you do it without? e Write a full tree class that includes all the creation, destruction and assignments. e What is a red-black tree? O

Here is a typical header file for a tree node class \#ifndef TREE_NODE_H \#define TREE_NODE_H class TreeNode \{ public: TreeNode* Left; TreeNode* Right; double data; \}; double GetSum(const TreeNode& top); \#endif Note, however, that we would really need a lot of ancillary code to handle creation and destruction of nodes, but here we present a minimalist solution that would suffice for answering this question. problems.explanationZh:
最简单的方法是通过递归。显然，解决方案取决于我们如何表示树。一个简单的解决方案是它是包含一段数据的节点的集合，以及指向其他两个节点的指针。如果节点不存在，则指针指向零。这是树节点类的典型头文件 \#ifndef TREE_NODE_H \#define TREE_NODE_H class TreeNode \{ public: TreeNode* Left;树节点*右；双数据； \}； double GetSum(const TreeNode& top); \#endif 但请注意，我们确实需要大量辅助代码来处理节点的创建和销毁，但在这里我们提出了一个足以回答这个问题的极简解决方案。我们的解决方案不处理树为空的 null 情况，但是可以通过将树放在一个负责空的类中来处理。遍历整棵树最简单的方法是使用递归。总和将是顶部的值加上其下面两个节点（如果存在）中每个节点的值的总和。因此，一个简单的解决方案是：

5.3.解决方案 double GetSum(const TreeNode& top) \{ double value = top.data; if (top.Left!=0) value += GetSum(*top.Left); if (top.Right!=0) value += GetSum(*top.Right);返回值； \} 以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 修改解决方案以处理空案例。 e 上面的解决方案使用了递归，你可以不用递归吗？ e 编写一个完整的树类，其中包括所有创建、销毁和赋值。 e 什么是红黑树？氧

problems.titleEn: Question 5.20 - Monte Carlo pricing of a far out-of-the-money digital call
problems.titleZh: 问题 5.20 - 用蒙特卡罗定价深度虚值数字看涨期权
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Given that a stock price at time T is N(100, 1), you want to price a digital call struck at 110 by Monte Carlo simulation. What will happen if you do this? Improve the method.
problems.promptZh: 已知时间 T 的股票价格服从 N(100,1)。你想用蒙特卡罗模拟定价执行价为 110 的数字看涨期权。直接模拟会发生什么？如何改进？
problems.answer:
Naive Monte Carlo will almost always return zero, because
$$P(N(100,1)>110)=P(Z>10)\approx7.6\times10^{-24}.$$
Use importance sampling, for example draw $Z$ from $N(10,1)$ and weight each digital payoff by the likelihood ratio $\phi(Z)/\phi(Z-10)$.
problems.answerEn:
Naive Monte Carlo will almost always return zero, because
$$P(N(100,1)>110)=P(Z>10)\approx7.6\times10^{-24}.$$
Use importance sampling, for example draw $Z$ from $N(10,1)$ and weight each digital payoff by the likelihood ratio $\phi(Z)/\phi(Z-10)$.
problems.answerZh:
朴素蒙特卡罗几乎总会返回零，因为
$$P(N(100,1)>110)=P(Z>10)\approx7.6\times10^{-24}.$$
可使用重要性抽样，例如从 $N(10,1)$ 抽取 $Z$，并把每条路径的数字期权收益乘以似然比 $\phi(Z)/\phi(Z-10)$。
problems.explanation:
Write
$$S_T=100+Z,\qquad Z\sim N(0,1).$$
The digital call pays $1$ when $Z>10$. This is a ten-standard-deviation event, with probability about $7.6\times10^{-24}$. For any ordinary number of Monte Carlo paths, no simulated path will exceed the strike, so the estimate will be exactly zero.

Importance sampling shifts the sampling distribution toward the rare event. Draw instead
$$Z\sim N(10,1),$$
whose density is $q(z)=\phi(z-10)$, while the original density is $p(z)=\phi(z)$. Then estimate
$$E_p[1_{\{Z>10\}}]
=E_q\left[1_{\{Z>10\}}\frac{p(Z)}{q(Z)}\right]
=E_q\left[1_{\{Z>10\}}\frac{\phi(Z)}{\phi(Z-10)}\right].$$
If discounting is required, multiply the final estimate by the discount factor.
problems.explanationEn:
Write
$$S_T=100+Z,\qquad Z\sim N(0,1).$$
The digital call pays $1$ when $Z>10$. This is a ten-standard-deviation event, with probability about $7.6\times10^{-24}$. For any ordinary number of Monte Carlo paths, no simulated path will exceed the strike, so the estimate will be exactly zero.

Importance sampling shifts the sampling distribution toward the rare event. Draw instead
$$Z\sim N(10,1),$$
whose density is $q(z)=\phi(z-10)$, while the original density is $p(z)=\phi(z)$. Then estimate
$$E_p[1_{\{Z>10\}}]
=E_q\left[1_{\{Z>10\}}\frac{p(Z)}{q(Z)}\right]
=E_q\left[1_{\{Z>10\}}\frac{\phi(Z)}{\phi(Z-10)}\right].$$
If discounting is required, multiply the final estimate by the discount factor.
problems.explanationZh:
写成
$$S_T=100+Z,\qquad Z\sim N(0,1).$$
数字看涨期权在 $Z>10$ 时支付 $1$。这是十个标准差事件，概率约为 $7.6\times10^{-24}$。对普通规模的蒙特卡罗路径，几乎不可能模拟到超过执行价的路径，因此估计值通常会精确等于零。

重要性抽样会把采样分布移动到稀有事件附近。改为抽取
$$Z\sim N(10,1),$$
其密度为 $q(z)=\phi(z-10)$，原始密度为 $p(z)=\phi(z)$。于是估计
$$E_p[1_{\{Z>10\}}]
=E_q\left[1_{\{Z>10\}}\frac{p(Z)}{q(Z)}\right]
=E_q\left[1_{\{Z>10\}}\frac{\phi(Z)}{\phi(Z-10)}\right].$$
若题目需要贴现，则最后再乘以贴现因子。
problems.manualContentReviewReason: Rare-event Monte Carlo explanation had broken formulas and leaked the next chapter into the Chinese solution.

problems.titleEn: Question 6.2 - Limit of sqrt(x^2 + 5x) minus x
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.2 - sqrt(x^2 + 5x) 减 x 的极限
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn:
Evaluate
$$\lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x\right).$$
problems.promptZh:
计算
$$\lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x\right).$$
problems.answer: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x\right)=\frac52.$$
problems.answerEn: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x\right)=\frac52.$$
problems.answerZh: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x\right)=\frac52.$$
problems.explanation:
Rationalize the expression:
$$\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x
=\frac{x^2+5x-x^2}{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x}
=\frac{5x}{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x}.$$
For $x>0$, divide numerator and denominator by $x$:
$$\frac{5}{\sqrt{1+5/x}+1}.$$
As $x\to\infty$, $5/x\to0$, so the limit is
$$\frac{5}{1+1}=\frac52.$$
problems.explanationEn:
Rationalize the expression:
$$\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x
=\frac{x^2+5x-x^2}{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x}
=\frac{5x}{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x}.$$
For $x>0$, divide numerator and denominator by $x$:
$$\frac{5}{\sqrt{1+5/x}+1}.$$
As $x\to\infty$, $5/x\to0$, so the limit is
$$\frac{5}{1+1}=\frac52.$$
problems.explanationZh:
先有理化：
$$\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x
=\frac{x^2+5x-x^2}{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x}
=\frac{5x}{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x}.$$
当 $x>0$ 时，分子分母同除以 $x$：
$$\frac{5}{\sqrt{1+5/x}+1}.$$
当 $x\to\infty$ 时，$5/x\to0$，所以极限为
$$\frac{5}{1+1}=\frac52.$$

problems.titleEn: Question 6.4 - How would you determine 7 by Monte Carlo simulation
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.4 - 如何通过蒙特卡罗模拟确定 7
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: How would you determine 7 by Monte Carlo simulation?
problems.promptZh: 如何通过蒙特卡罗模拟确定 7？
problems.explanation:
The general principle here is that we can find the area of any set by computing the expectation of the indicator function of the set after enclosing it in a square (or cube). That is we find what proportion of points drawn from the square at random lie in the set. We compute the area of a circle with radius 1/2 centred at (1/2, 1/2) and multiply by 4, since the area is given by A=nr'. To compute the area, repeatedly draw pairs of independent uniforms from (0, 1] x [0,1], and measure what fraction land inside the circle (that is, if your uniforms are U; and U2, check that (U, - 1/2) + (U2 - 1/2)? < 1). This will converge to 7/4 at a rate of n - 1/2 by the Central Limit theorem.

6. MATHEMATICS Here are some possible related questions: e Do you think this a good way to numerically approximate 7? e Prove that the rate of convergence is n\sim 1/?. e What is Monte Carlo good for? e How would you approximate a if you had to find it to 100 decimal places? O

This will converge to 7/4 at a rate of n - 1/2 by the Central Limit theorem.

problems.explanation: The key to this question is to recognize that it is a statement about convexity. A function is strictly convex if and only if the second derivative is positive, equivalently if and only if the chord between two points on the graph lies above the graph. We are asked to prove the latter condition for the special case that the point is the midpoint of the interval. We check the second derivative. Let f(x) = e* so f” (x) > 0 and the answer is immediate. Here are some possible related questions: e Are convex functions always differentiable? e Are convex functions always continuous? e If the mid-point of every chord is above the graph, does this make the function convex? e Do the problem using the inequality of arithmetic and geometric means. O

problems.titleEn: Question 6.6 - Compare e^7 and 7^e
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.6 - 比较 e^7 和 7^e
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Which is larger, $e^7$ or $7^e$? Prove it mathematically.
problems.promptZh: $e^7$ 和 $7^e$ 哪个更大？请用数学方法证明。
problems.explanation:
Taking logarithms, compare
$$\log(e^7)=7$$
with
$$\log(7^e)=e\log 7.$$
Now consider
$$f(x)=\frac{\log x}{x}.$$
Its derivative is
$$f'(x)=\frac{1-\log x}{x^2},$$
so $f$ is decreasing for $x>e$. Since $7>e$,
$$\frac{\log 7}{7}<\frac{\log e}{e}=\frac1e.$$
Multiplying by $7e$ gives
$$e\log 7<7.$$
Therefore
$$\log(7^e)<\log(e^7),$$
and hence $e^7>7^e$.
problems.explanationEn:

$$\log(e^7)=7$$
with
$$\log(7^e)=e\log 7.$$

$$\frac{\log 7}{7}<\frac{\log e}{e}=\frac1e.$$
Multiplying by $7e$ gives
$$e\log 7<7.$$
Therefore
$$\log(7^e)<\log(e^7),$$
and hence $e^7>7^e$.

$$\log(e^7)=7$$
和
$$\log(7^e)=e\log 7.$$

$$f(x)=\frac{\log x}{x}.$$
其导数为
$$f'(x)=\frac{1-\log x}{x^2},$$

$$\frac{\log 7}{7}<\frac{\log e}{e}=\frac1e.$$
两边乘以 $7e$ 得
$$e\log 7<7.$$
所以
$$\log(7^e)<\log(e^7),$$
从而 $e^7>7^e$。

problems.titleEn: Question 6.7 - Evaluate a repeating continued fraction
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.7 - 计算重复连分数
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn:
Evaluate the continued fraction
$$2+\frac{2}{2+\frac{2}{2+\cdots}}.$$
problems.promptZh:
计算连分数
$$2+\frac{2}{2+\frac{2}{2+\cdots}}.$$
problems.answer:
For
$$2+\frac{2}{2+\frac{2}{2+\cdots}},$$
the value is
$$1+\sqrt3.$$
problems.answerEn:
For
$$2+\frac{2}{2+\frac{2}{2+\cdots}},$$
the value is
$$1+\sqrt3.$$
problems.explanation:
Let the value of the continued fraction be $y$. Because the tail after the first denominator repeats the whole expression,
$$y=2+\frac{2}{y}.$$
Multiplying by $y$ gives
$$y^2-2y-2=0.$$
The two algebraic roots are
$$y=1\pm\sqrt3.$$
The continued fraction is clearly greater than $2$, so the valid root is
$$y=1+\sqrt3.$$
problems.explanationEn:
Let the value of the continued fraction be $y$. Because the tail after the first denominator repeats the whole expression,
$$y=2+\frac{2}{y}.$$
Multiplying by $y$ gives
$$y^2-2y-2=0.$$
The two algebraic roots are
$$y=1\pm\sqrt3.$$
The continued fraction is clearly greater than $2$, so the valid root is
$$y=1+\sqrt3.$$
problems.explanationZh:
设该连分数的值为 $y$。由于第一个分母之后的尾部仍然是同一个表达式，
$$y=2+\frac{2}{y}.$$
两边乘以 $y$：
$$y^2-2y-2=0.$$
代数根为
$$y=1\pm\sqrt3.$$
原连分数显然大于 $2$，所以取
$$y=1+\sqrt3.$$

problems.promptZh: 什么是拐点？ N(u,o) 个随机变量的累积分布函数的拐点坐标是多少？
problems.explanation:
An inflection point, or point of inflection, is a point on a curve where the sign of the curvature (concavity) changes. To find inflection points of a function f(z), note that it is necessary to have f” (x) = 0. However this condition is not sufficient, and we must further check that the second derivative has changed sign at this point, rather than just touching zero. This is positive for z > yw and negative for x < ps, so the second derivative changes sign and we are done.

problems.promptEn: What is a positive-definite matrix? What properties does a positive-definite matrix have?
problems.promptZh: 什么是正定矩阵？正定矩阵有什么性质？
problems.explanation:
There are several equivalent definitions for a positive-definite matrix, which must be a square matrix. We will state the most common definition, and note a couple of useful equivalent properties. For a matrix A, we will denote by A? its transpose and by A* its conjugate transpose. Recall that if A has entries Ajj, <i <n,1< Jj <n, then its transpose has entries Ai, = Aj; and the conjugate transpose is formed by first taking the transpose and then the complex conjugate of each entry. Let M be an x n matrix. Then M is positive definite if for all non-zero vectors z ∈ C” we have z*Mz > 0. This is the most common definition of a positive definite matrix. However it may be useful to use an alternative, equivalent, definition. If M7 is a Hermitian matrix (a matrix is Hermitian if it is square and equal to its own conjugate transpose - for a matrix with only real entries, this is equivalent to being square and symmetric), then M is positive definite if and only if either e M has only positive eigenvalues; or e All the following matrices have positive determinant: - The upper-left 1-by-1 corner of M - The upper-left 2-by-2 corner of M -M. Most often in quantitative finance, we are only concerned with the case where the matrix is a covariance matrix, in which case the matrix is real and symmetric. A real symmetric matrix is a covariance matrix for some set of random variables if and only if it is positive semi-definite. The “semi” refers to the fact

6. MATHEMATICS that zero eigenvalues are allowed, and thus there are vectors such that a'Ma = 0, but non-negativity is still required. Here are some possible related questions: e Are the following positive definite matrices? (a) (b) cos(\#) —sin(6) sin(@) —cos(@) O

problems.titleEn: Question 6.10 - Matrix square root and Cholesky factor
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.10 - 矩阵平方根和 Cholesky 因子
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn:
Given
$$A=\begin{pmatrix}5&-3\\-3&5\end{pmatrix},$$
find a matrix $M$ such that $A=M^2$. Then find a matrix $C$ such that $A=C^TC$.
problems.promptZh:
给定
$$A=\begin{pmatrix}5&-3\\-3&5\end{pmatrix},$$
求矩阵 $M$ 使 $A=M^2$。再求矩阵 $C$ 使 $A=C^TC$。
problems.answer:
For
$$A=\begin{pmatrix}5&-3\\-3&5\end{pmatrix},$$
one symmetric square root is
$$M=\frac{\sqrt2}{2}\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix},\qquad M^2=A.$$
One upper-triangular factor satisfying $A=C^TC$ is
$$C=\begin{pmatrix}\sqrt5&-3/\sqrt5\\0&4/\sqrt5\end{pmatrix}.$$
problems.answerEn:
For
$$A=\begin{pmatrix}5&-3\\-3&5\end{pmatrix},$$
one symmetric square root is
$$M=\frac{\sqrt2}{2}\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix},\qquad M^2=A.$$
One upper-triangular factor satisfying $A=C^TC$ is
$$C=\begin{pmatrix}\sqrt5&-3/\sqrt5\\0&4/\sqrt5\end{pmatrix}.$$
problems.answerZh:
对
$$A=\begin{pmatrix}5&-3\\-3&5\end{pmatrix},$$
一个对称平方根为
$$M=\frac{\sqrt2}{2}\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix},\qquad M^2=A.$$
一个满足 $A=C^TC$ 的上三角因子为
$$C=\begin{pmatrix}\sqrt5&-3/\sqrt5\\0&4/\sqrt5\end{pmatrix}.$$
problems.explanation:
For the square root, observe that
$$B=\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix}$$
satisfies
$$B^2=\begin{pmatrix}10&-6\\-6&10\end{pmatrix}=2A.$$
Therefore
$$M=\frac{1}{\sqrt2}B
=\frac{\sqrt2}{2}\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix}$$
satisfies $M^2=A$.

For $A=C^TC$, take an upper-triangular Cholesky factor
$$C=\begin{pmatrix}a&b\\0&d\end{pmatrix}.$$
Then
$$C^TC=\begin{pmatrix}a^2&ab\\ab&b^2+d^2\end{pmatrix}.$$
Set $a=\sqrt5$, $b=-3/\sqrt5$, and $d=4/\sqrt5$. This gives $a^2=5$, $ab=-3$, and $b^2+d^2=9/5+16/5=5$.
problems.explanationEn:
For the square root, observe that
$$B=\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix}$$
satisfies
$$B^2=\begin{pmatrix}10&-6\\-6&10\end{pmatrix}=2A.$$
Therefore
$$M=\frac{1}{\sqrt2}B
=\frac{\sqrt2}{2}\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix}$$
satisfies $M^2=A$.

For $A=C^TC$, take an upper-triangular Cholesky factor
$$C=\begin{pmatrix}a&b\\0&d\end{pmatrix}.$$
Then
$$C^TC=\begin{pmatrix}a^2&ab\\ab&b^2+d^2\end{pmatrix}.$$
Set $a=\sqrt5$, $b=-3/\sqrt5$, and $d=4/\sqrt5$. This gives $a^2=5$, $ab=-3$, and $b^2+d^2=9/5+16/5=5$.
problems.explanationZh:
对平方根，注意
$$B=\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix}$$
满足
$$B^2=\begin{pmatrix}10&-6\\-6&10\end{pmatrix}=2A.$$
因此
$$M=\frac{1}{\sqrt2}B
=\frac{\sqrt2}{2}\begin{pmatrix}3&-1\\-1&3\end{pmatrix}$$
满足 $M^2=A$。

对 $A=C^TC$，取上三角 Cholesky 因子
$$C=\begin{pmatrix}a&b\\0&d\end{pmatrix}.$$
则
$$C^TC=\begin{pmatrix}a^2&ab\\ab&b^2+d^2\end{pmatrix}.$$
令 $a=\sqrt5$，$b=-3/\sqrt5$，$d=4/\sqrt5$，即可得到 $a^2=5$，$ab=-3$，且 $b^2+d^2=9/5+16/5=5$。

problems.promptEn: Let A, Ag,..., An denote a permutation of 1,2,...,n. Show that the product (A; - 1)(Ag - 2)...(A, - n) is even when n is odd.
problems.promptZh: 设 A, Ag,..., An 表示 1,2,...,n 的排列。证明当 n 为奇数时，乘积 (A; — 1)(Ag — 2)...(A, — n) 为偶数。
problems.explanation: We begin by recalling some rules regarding subtraction and multiplication of odd and even integers: odd - odd = even, odd - even = odd, even - even = even, odd x odd = odd, odd x even = even, even X even = even. Observing this, we can see that the statement B, x By x --- x By is even is equivalent to saying that at least one of the $B_t$'s is even, 1 <7 < n. In other words our task is to show that one of the terms (A; - i), 1 < i <n, is even when 7 is odd. Whenn is odd, we have (n+ 1)/2 odd numbers and (n - 1)/2 even numbers amongst the A,'s (and hence amongst the numbers 1, 2,..., which we subtract from them). However to avoid having any even numbers, we must subtract from each odd number an even number (and from each even an odd, but we can ignore this). This is clearly not possible since there are more odd A;'s than there are even numbers in 1,2,...,n. Here are some possible related questions: e What conclusions can you draw when n is even? e Does the problem change if instead of writing (A;—7) we write (A;+7)? e If instead we look at the product of factors (A;— 27) the result is always even, why is this? O

我们首先回顾一下有关奇数和偶数的减法和乘法的一些规则：奇数 - 奇数 = 偶数、奇数 - 偶数 = 奇数、偶数 - 偶数 = 偶数、奇数 x 奇数 = 奇数、奇数 x 偶数 = 偶数、偶数 X 偶数 = 偶数。观察这一点，我们可以看到，语句 B, x By x --- x By is Even 相当于说 B; 中至少有一个是偶数，1 < 7 < n。换句话说，我们的任务是证明当 7 为奇数时，其中一项 (A; — i) 1 < i < n 为偶数。当 n 为奇数时，我们在 A, 中有 (n+ 1)/2 个奇数和 (n-1)/2 个偶数（因此在数字 1, 2,... 中，我们从中减去）。然而，为了避免出现偶数，我们必须从每个奇数中减去一个偶数（并且从每个偶数中减去一个奇数，但我们可以忽略这一点）。这显然是不可能的，因为奇数 A; 的数量比 1,2,...,n 中的偶数还要多。以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 当 n 为偶数时，你能得出什么结论？ e 如果我们不写(A;—7)而写(A;+7)，问题会改变吗？ e 相反，如果我们看一下因子 (A;— 27) 的乘积，结果总是偶数，这是为什么呢？氧

Cauchy's estimate states that if f is differentiable on the open disc |z - zo| < R, and |f(z)| < M for |z - z0| <r, O<r< AR, then Mn! (n) F(a) << for all integers n > 0. For us this gives, with r arbitrary, M If'(z0)| < —. r However since f is differentiable on the whole plane andr is arbitrary, we can let r - oo. The short, and perhaps obvious answer from the way the question is posed, is no. This is perhaps one of the most commonly used examples of a divergent series and there's a good chance you know the answer off the top of your head. Let's look at how to prove it. First consider the function (x)= - >1 £) = - x; where || denotes the largest integer less than or equal to x. The integral over (1, co) of this function clearly gives the desired sum, roe) co g(x)dx=) -. In addition, g(x) dominates the function f(x) = 4, x > 1, that is g(x) > f(z) for z > 1. Hence we have oo [oe] 1 / g(x)dx > / —dx \# = [log(x)|° = 0, proving that the original sum is unbounded (please note that we have been a little sloppy on notation here, but the idea is solid.)

problems.titleEn: Question 6.17 - Transform the Black-Scholes equation into the heat equation
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.17 - 将 Black-Scholes 方程转换为热方程
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Transform the Black-Scholes equation into the heat equation.
problems.promptZh:
将 Black-Scholes 方程转换为热方程。

6.2.问题 19] 6.2.2。整合与分化。
problems.answer: Use x=ln(S/K), tau=(sigma^2/2)(T-t), k=2r/sigma^2, and C=K exp(alpha x + beta tau)u with alpha=-(k-1)/2 and beta=-(k+1)^2/4; then u_tau=u_xx.
problems.answerEn: Use x=ln(S/K), tau=(sigma^2/2)(T-t), k=2r/sigma^2, and C=K exp(alpha x + beta tau)u with alpha=-(k-1)/2 and beta=-(k+1)^2/4; then u_tau=u_xx.
problems.answerZh: 令 x=ln(S/K)、tau=(sigma^2/2)(T-t)、k=2r/sigma^2，并设 C=K exp(alpha x + beta tau)u，其中 alpha=-(k-1)/2、beta=-(k+1)^2/4，即可得到 u_tau=u_xx。
problems.explanation:
For a non-dividend-paying stock, the Black-Scholes PDE is C_t + (1/2)sigma^2 S^2 C_SS + r S C_S - r C = 0.

Let x=ln(S/K), tau=(sigma^2/2)(T-t), and k=2r/sigma^2. In these variables the PDE becomes C_tau = C_xx + (k-1)C_x - kC.

Now set C=K exp(alpha x + beta tau)u(x,tau). Choose alpha=-(k-1)/2 to eliminate the first-derivative term, and beta=-(k+1)^2/4 to eliminate the zero-order term.

With these choices, the transformed function u satisfies the standard one-dimensional heat equation u_tau = u_xx. The payoff and boundary conditions must then be transformed through the same substitutions.
problems.explanationEn:
For a non-dividend-paying stock, the Black-Scholes PDE is C_t + (1/2)sigma^2 S^2 C_SS + r S C_S - r C = 0.

Let x=ln(S/K), tau=(sigma^2/2)(T-t), and k=2r/sigma^2. In these variables the PDE becomes C_tau = C_xx + (k-1)C_x - kC.

Now set C=K exp(alpha x + beta tau)u(x,tau). Choose alpha=-(k-1)/2 to eliminate the first-derivative term, and beta=-(k+1)^2/4 to eliminate the zero-order term.

With these choices, the transformed function u satisfies the standard one-dimensional heat equation u_tau = u_xx. The payoff and boundary conditions must then be transformed through the same substitutions.
problems.explanationZh:
对于不分红股票，Black-Scholes PDE 为 C_t + (1/2)sigma^2 S^2 C_SS + r S C_S - r C = 0。

令 x=ln(S/K)、tau=(sigma^2/2)(T-t)，并设 k=2r/sigma^2。在这些变量下，PDE 变为 C_tau = C_xx + (k-1)C_x - kC。

再设 C=K exp(alpha x + beta tau)u(x,tau)。选择 alpha=-(k-1)/2 可消去一阶导项，选择 beta=-(k+1)^2/4 可消去零阶项。

于是变换后的函数 u 满足标准一维热方程 u_tau = u_xx。期权 payoff 和边界条件也需要通过同样的变量替换进行变换。

problems.titleEn: Question 6.18 - Derivative of x^x
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.18 - x^x 的导数
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: What is the derivative of $f(x)=x^x$?
problems.promptZh: 函数 $f(x)=x^x$ 的导数是什么？
problems.answer:
For $x>0$,
$$\frac{d}{dx}x^x=x^x(\log x+1).$$
problems.answerEn:
For $x>0$,
$$\frac{d}{dx}x^x=x^x(\log x+1).$$
problems.answerZh:
对 $x>0$，
$$\frac{d}{dx}x^x=x^x(\log x+1).$$
problems.explanation:
Rewrite
$$x^x=e^{x\log x},\qquad x>0.$$
Using the chain rule and product rule,
$$\frac{d}{dx}e^{x\log x}
=e^{x\log x}\frac{d}{dx}(x\log x)
=x^x(\log x+1).$$
problems.explanationEn:
Rewrite
$$x^x=e^{x\log x},\qquad x>0.$$
Using the chain rule and product rule,
$$\frac{d}{dx}e^{x\log x}
=e^{x\log x}\frac{d}{dx}(x\log x)
=x^x(\log x+1).$$
problems.explanationZh:
先写成
$$x^x=e^{x\log x},\qquad x>0.$$
由链式法则和乘积法则，
$$\frac{d}{dx}e^{x\log x}
=e^{x\log x}\frac{d}{dx}(x\log x)
=x^x(\log x+1).$$
problems.manualContentReviewReason: Derivative of x^x was garbled and categorized incorrectly.

problems.promptEn:
Compute
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial r}\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n}$$
and
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial f_i}\prod_j\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}.$$
problems.promptZh:
计算
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial r}\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n}$$
以及
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial f_i}\prod_j\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}.$$
problems.explanation:
For the first expression, apply the chain rule:
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial r}\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n}
=-n\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n-1}\frac1n
=-\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n-1}.$$

For the product, only the factor involving $f_i$ changes with $f_i$. Hence
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial f_i}\prod_j\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}
=\left(-\frac{t_i}{(1+f_it_i)^2}\right)\prod_{j\ne i}\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}.$$
Equivalently,
$$-\frac{t_i}{1+f_it_i}\prod_j\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}.$$
problems.explanationEn:
For the first expression, apply the chain rule:
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial r}\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n}
=-n\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n-1}\frac1n
=-\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n-1}.$$

For the product, only the factor involving $f_i$ changes with $f_i$. Hence
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial f_i}\prod_j\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}
=\left(-\frac{t_i}{(1+f_it_i)^2}\right)\prod_{j\ne i}\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}.$$
Equivalently,
$$-\frac{t_i}{1+f_it_i}\prod_j\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}.$$
problems.explanationZh:
第一个式子直接用链式法则：
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial r}\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n}
=-n\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n-1}\frac1n
=-\left(1+\frac{r}{n}\right)^{-n-1}.$$

对乘积而言，只有含 $f_i$ 的因子会随 $f_i$ 改变。因此
$$\frac{\partial}{\partial f_i}\prod_j\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}
=\left(-\frac{t_i}{(1+f_it_i)^2}\right)\prod_{j\ne i}\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}.$$
也可写成
$$-\frac{t_i}{1+f_it_i}\prod_j\frac{1}{1+f_jt_j}.$$
problems.manualContentReviewReason: Discount-factor derivative formulas were OCR-corrupted.

problems.titleEn: Question 6.20 - Derive the derivative of exp(cos x) from first principles
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.20 - 从第一原理推导 exp(cos x) 的导数
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn:
Derive from first principles the derivative of
$$g(x)=e^{\cos x}.$$
problems.promptZh:
从第一原理推导
$$g(x)=e^{\cos x}$$
的导数。
problems.answer:
For
$$g(x)=e^{\cos x},$$
the derivative is
$$g'(x)=-\sin x\,e^{\cos x}.$$
problems.answerEn:
For
$$g(x)=e^{\cos x},$$
the derivative is
$$g'(x)=-\sin x\,e^{\cos x}.$$
problems.answerZh:
若
$$g(x)=e^{\cos x},$$
则
$$g'(x)=-\sin x\,e^{\cos x}.$$
problems.explanation:
Start from the definition:
$$g'(x)=\lim_{h\to0}\frac{e^{\cos(x+h)}-e^{\cos x}}{h}.$$
Factor out $e^{\cos x}$:
$$g'(x)=e^{\cos x}\lim_{h\to0}\frac{e^{\cos(x+h)-\cos x}-1}{h}.$$
Since $\cos(x+h)-\cos x=O(h)$ and $e^u-1=u+O(u^2)$,
$$g'(x)=e^{\cos x}\lim_{h\to0}\frac{\cos(x+h)-\cos x+O(h^2)}{h}.$$
The remaining limit is the derivative of cosine, $-\sin x$, so
$$g'(x)=-\sin x\,e^{\cos x}.$$
problems.explanationEn:
Start from the definition:
$$g'(x)=\lim_{h\to0}\frac{e^{\cos(x+h)}-e^{\cos x}}{h}.$$
Factor out $e^{\cos x}$:
$$g'(x)=e^{\cos x}\lim_{h\to0}\frac{e^{\cos(x+h)-\cos x}-1}{h}.$$
Since $\cos(x+h)-\cos x=O(h)$ and $e^u-1=u+O(u^2)$,
$$g'(x)=e^{\cos x}\lim_{h\to0}\frac{\cos(x+h)-\cos x+O(h^2)}{h}.$$
The remaining limit is the derivative of cosine, $-\sin x$, so
$$g'(x)=-\sin x\,e^{\cos x}.$$
problems.explanationZh:
从导数定义出发：
$$g'(x)=\lim_{h\to0}\frac{e^{\cos(x+h)}-e^{\cos x}}{h}.$$
提出 $e^{\cos x}$：
$$g'(x)=e^{\cos x}\lim_{h\to0}\frac{e^{\cos(x+h)-\cos x}-1}{h}.$$
由于 $\cos(x+h)-\cos x=O(h)$，且 $e^u-1=u+O(u^2)$，
$$g'(x)=e^{\cos x}\lim_{h\to0}\frac{\cos(x+h)-\cos x+O(h^2)}{h}.$$
剩余极限就是余弦函数的导数，即 $-\sin x$，所以
$$g'(x)=-\sin x\,e^{\cos x}.$$
problems.manualContentReviewReason: First-principles derivative of exp(cos x) was OCR-corrupted.

problems.titleEn: Question 6.21 - Differentiate x log x
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.21 - 对 x log x 求导
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Differentiate $f(x)=x\log x$.
problems.promptZh: 对 $f(x)=x\log x$ 求导。
problems.answer:
For $x>0$,
$$\frac{d}{dx}\left(x\log x\right)=\log x+1.$$
problems.answerEn:
For $x>0$,
$$\frac{d}{dx}\left(x\log x\right)=\log x+1.$$
problems.answerZh:
对 $x>0$，
$$\frac{d}{dx}\left(x\log x\right)=\log x+1.$$
problems.explanation:
Use the product rule:
$$\frac{d}{dx}(x\log x)
=1\cdot\log x+x\cdot\frac1x
=\log x+1.$$
problems.explanationEn:
Use the product rule:
$$\frac{d}{dx}(x\log x)
=1\cdot\log x+x\cdot\frac1x
=\log x+1.$$
problems.explanationZh:
使用乘积法则：
$$\frac{d}{dx}(x\log x)
=1\cdot\log x+x\cdot\frac1x
=\log x+1.$$

problems.titleEn: Question 6.22 - Integral of log x
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.22 - log x 的积分
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn:
Evaluate
$$\int \log x\,dx.$$
problems.promptZh:
计算
$$\int \log x\,dx.$$
problems.answer: $$\int \log x\,dx=x\log x-x+C.$$
problems.answerEn: $$\int \log x\,dx=x\log x-x+C.$$
problems.answerZh: $$\int \log x\,dx=x\log x-x+C.$$
problems.explanation:
Use integration by parts with $u=\log x$ and $dv=dx$. Then $du=dx/x$ and $v=x$, so
$$\int \log x\,dx
=x\log x-\int x\frac{1}{x}\,dx
=x\log x-x+C.$$
problems.explanationEn:
Use integration by parts with $u=\log x$ and $dv=dx$. Then $du=dx/x$ and $v=x$, so
$$\int \log x\,dx
=x\log x-\int x\frac{1}{x}\,dx
=x\log x-x+C.$$
problems.explanationZh:
使用分部积分，取 $u=\log x$，$dv=dx$。则 $du=dx/x$，$v=x$，所以
$$\int \log x\,dx
=x\log x-\int x\frac{1}{x}\,dx
=x\log x-x+C.$$
problems.manualContentReviewReason: Integral of log x prompt and solution were ambiguous and corrupted.

problems.titleEn: Question 6.23 - Integral of (log x)^n
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.23 - (log x)^n 的积分
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn:
Evaluate
$$\int(\log x)^n\,dx.$$
problems.promptZh:
计算
$$\int(\log x)^n\,dx.$$
problems.answer:
Let
$$I_n=\int(\log x)^n\,dx.$$
Then
$$I_n=x(\log x)^n-nI_{n-1}.$$
Equivalently,
$$I_n=x\sum_{k=0}^{n}(-1)^k\frac{n!}{(n-k)!}(\log x)^{n-k}+C.$$
problems.answerEn:
Let
$$I_n=\int(\log x)^n\,dx.$$
Then
$$I_n=x(\log x)^n-nI_{n-1}.$$
Equivalently,
$$I_n=x\sum_{k=0}^{n}(-1)^k\frac{n!}{(n-k)!}(\log x)^{n-k}+C.$$
problems.answerZh:
令
$$I_n=\int(\log x)^n\,dx.$$
则
$$I_n=x(\log x)^n-nI_{n-1}.$$
等价地，
$$I_n=x\sum_{k=0}^{n}(-1)^k\frac{n!}{(n-k)!}(\log x)^{n-k}+C.$$
problems.explanation:
Use integration by parts with
$$u=(\log x)^n,\qquad dv=dx.$$
Then
$$du=n(\log x)^{n-1}\frac{dx}{x},\qquad v=x.$$
So
$$I_n=x(\log x)^n-n\int(\log x)^{n-1}\,dx
=x(\log x)^n-nI_{n-1}.$$
Iterating this recurrence gives
$$I_n=x\left((\log x)^n-n(\log x)^{n-1}+n(n-1)(\log x)^{n-2}-\cdots+(-1)^nn!\right)+C,$$
which is the same as the summation formula in the answer.
problems.explanationEn:
Use integration by parts with
$$u=(\log x)^n,\qquad dv=dx.$$
Then
$$du=n(\log x)^{n-1}\frac{dx}{x},\qquad v=x.$$
So
$$I_n=x(\log x)^n-n\int(\log x)^{n-1}\,dx
=x(\log x)^n-nI_{n-1}.$$
Iterating this recurrence gives
$$I_n=x\left((\log x)^n-n(\log x)^{n-1}+n(n-1)(\log x)^{n-2}-\cdots+(-1)^nn!\right)+C,$$
which is the same as the summation formula in the answer.
problems.explanationZh:
使用分部积分，取
$$u=(\log x)^n,\qquad dv=dx.$$
则
$$du=n(\log x)^{n-1}\frac{dx}{x},\qquad v=x.$$
所以
$$I_n=x(\log x)^n-n\int(\log x)^{n-1}\,dx
=x(\log x)^n-nI_{n-1}.$$
不断迭代该递推式，得到
$$I_n=x\left((\log x)^n-n(\log x)^{n-1}+n(n-1)(\log x)^{n-2}-\cdots+(-1)^nn!\right)+C,$$
这与答案中的求和公式等价。
problems.manualContentReviewReason: Integral of log^n x prompt and induction formula were garbled.

problems.titleEn: Question 6.24 - Evaluate a simple double integral
problems.titleZh: 问题 6.24 - 计算一个简单二重积分
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.explanation:
First evaluate the inner integral:
$$\int_{1/2}^{1/2+x}2\,dy
=2\left((1/2+x)-1/2\right)
=2x.$$
Then
$$\int_0^{1/2}2x\,dx
=\left.x^2\right|_0^{1/2}
=\frac14.$$
problems.explanationEn:
First evaluate the inner integral:
$$\int_{1/2}^{1/2+x}2\,dy
=2\left((1/2+x)-1/2\right)
=2x.$$
Then
$$\int_0^{1/2}2x\,dx
=\left.x^2\right|_0^{1/2}
=\frac14.$$

problems.titleEn: Question 7.1 - What compilers have you used
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.1 - 你用过什么编译器
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: What compilers have you used?
problems.promptZh: 你用过什么编译器？
problems.explanation:
The answer to this one can only be the truth. However, it is worth adopting some defensive behaviour to make sure that your answer is not boring.

7. CODING IN C++ In particular, it is good to have used one Microsoft compiler and one non- Microsoft one. At the time of writing, Visual Studio 8.0 Express is available as a free download from the Microsoft website. DevCpp is a good open source IDE (integrated development environment) available for free which is a front end for the g++ compiler. Another open source option is Eclipse with the C++ toolbox. This is harder to use than DevCpp but much more sophisticated and with the same compiler. The only truly compliant compiler is the Comeau computing one which is cheap but not free. Running your code under more than one compiler is a good habit to get into. Each compiler has its own peculiarities and the process of eliminating all errors, warnings and bugs under each can teach youa lot. Once you have mentioned more than one compiler or IDE, you are likely to be asked about the differences between them. Some points to make are: e Microsoft Visual Studio 8.0 supports range checking in debug mode for the STL. e The debugger in Visual Studio is much easier to use than GDB which is the open source alternative. e The only compiler that implements the “export” keyword (and therefore is the only compliant one) is the Comeau compiler. e The g++ compiler has the “electric fence” option which is useful for finding memory leaks and out of range errors. e The g++ compiler with the “-Wall” option gives a wider range of warnings such as telling you to make destructors virtual and to reorder class member initializers to match declarations. e Visual Studio 8.0 gives silly warning messages when you use STL algorithms unless you switch them off. O

problems.explanationZh:
这个问题的答案只能是事实。然而，采取一些防御行为是值得的，以确保你的答案不无聊。

7. C++ 编码 特别是，使用一种 Microsoft 编译器和一种非 Microsoft 编译器是件好事。在撰写本文时，Visual Studio 8.0 Express 可以从 Microsoft 网站免费下载。 DevCpp 是一个很好的免费开源 IDE（集成开发环境），它是 g++ 编译器的前端。另一个开源选项是带有 C++ 工具箱的 Eclipse。这比 DevCpp 更难使用，但更复杂，并且使用相同的编译器。唯一真正兼容的编译器是 Comeau 计算编译器，它便宜但不是免费的。在多个编译器下运行代码是一个值得养成的好习惯。每个编译器都有自己的特点，消除每个编译器下的所有错误、警告和错误的过程可以教会你很多东西。一旦您提到了多个编译器或 IDE，您可能会被问到它们之间的差异。需要指出的一些要点是： e Microsoft Visual Studio 8.0 支持 STL 调试模式下的范围检查。 e Visual Studio 中的调试器比开源替代方案 GDB 更容易使用。 e 唯一实现“export”关键字的编译器（因此也是唯一兼容的编译器）是 Comeau 编译器。 e g++ 编译器具有“电子围栏”选项，对于查找内存泄漏和超出范围错误非常有用。 e 带有“-Wall”选项的 g++ 编译器会提供更广泛的警告，例如告诉您将析构函数设为虚拟并重新排序类成员初始值设定项以匹配声明。当您使用 STL 算法时，Visual Studio 8.0 会给出愚蠢的警告消息，除非您将其关闭。氧

problems.promptEn: What C++ design patterns have you used?
problems.promptZh: 您使用过哪些 C++ 设计模式？
problems.explanation:
Here again, the answer can only be what you have used. However, as usual, you want to be in the position of having a good answer. A good starting point is to read [7]. For each pattern have an example in mind to discuss with the interviewer. Work through the projects in [6] using patterns

so as to have plenty of good examples. In particular, be able to explain and give an example of when you have used each of the following: e strategy; e template; e bridge; e virtual construction; e decoration; e singleton; e factory. Make sure that you can explain why you used that pattern and not a different one. If there are multiple choices, you should be ready to explain the pros and cons of each. O

problems.titleEn: Question 7.3 - What is the difference between an inline function and a macro in C++
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.3 - C++ 中的内联函数和宏有什么区别
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: What is the difference between an inline function and a macro in C++?
problems.promptZh: C++ 中的内联函数和宏有什么区别？
problems.explanation:
This question is a little strange in that there is an implication that the two are similar, whereas they actually have very little in common. We first discuss the keyword inline. Placing this in front of a function declaration tells the compiler that you would like it to replace each call to the function with the code inside the function. This then eliminates the overhead of makinga call to the function. There are subtleties, however: e it is a suggestion to the compiler not a command to the compiler; e the code may be longer because the definition of the function is repeated many times; e the code must be included in the header file so as to be available to clients, so changing it will cause a lot to recompile, and any compiletime dependencies it has, will also be dependencies for clients; e and on the plus side, the fact that the code is available to the compiler in context of use may allow the compiler to use extra optimizations; e adding or removing inline should never affect anything other than the efficiency of your program.

7. CODING IN C++ A macro is not actually anything to do with the compiler. Instead, it is an instruction to C-preprocessor or Cpp. The Cpp reorganizes a file before the compiler starts work by including all files specified, and by expanding macros. A macro is therefore a direct text to text substitution which takes places before the compiler does its job. As such it is a much more error prone tool and should generally be avoided. The main thing the two approaches have in common is that they allow the coding of simple functions in such a way that they can be used without the run-time overhead of a function call, and without duplicating code. Here are some possible related questions: e When are macros really needed? e When would you inline a function or method? e What are the dangers when using macros? O
problems.explanationEn:

This then eliminates the overhead of makinga call to the function. There are subtleties, however: e it is a suggestion to the compiler not a command to the compiler; e the code may be longer because the definition of the function is repeated many times; e the code must be included in the header file so as to be available to clients, so changing it will cause a lot to recompile, and any compiletime dependencies it has, will also be dependencies for clients; e and on the plus side, the fact that the code is available to the compiler in context of use may allow the compiler to use extra optimizations; e adding or removing inline should never affect anything other than the efficiency of your program.

7. CODING IN C++ A macro is not actually anything to do with the compiler. Instead, it is an instruction to C-preprocessor or Cpp. The Cpp reorganizes a file before the compiler starts work by including all files specified, and by expanding macros. A macro is therefore a direct text to text substitution which takes places before the compiler does its job. As such it is a much more error prone tool and should generally be avoided. The main thing the two approaches have in common is that they allow the coding of simple functions in such a way that they can be used without the run-time overhead of a function call, and without duplicating code. Here are some possible related questions: e When are macros really needed? e When would you inline a function or method? e What are the dangers when using macros? O
problems.explanationZh:
这个问题有点奇怪，因为这暗示着两者很相似，但实际上它们几乎没有共同点。我们首先讨论关键字inline。将其放在函数声明前面告诉编译器您希望它用函数内的代码替换对函数的每次调用。这样就消除了调用该函数的开销。然而，有一些微妙之处： e 这是对编译器的建议，而不是对编译器的命令； e 由于函数的定义被重复多次，代码可能会更长； e 代码必须包含在头文件中才能供客户端使用，因此更改它会导致大量重新编译，并且它具有的任何编译时依赖项也将成为客户端的依赖项； e 从好的方面来说，代码在使用上下文中可供编译器使用这一事实可能允许编译器使用额外的优化；添加或删除内联绝不会影响程序效率以外的任何事情。

7. C++ 中的编码 宏实际上与编译器没有任何关系。相反，它是 C 预处理器或 Cpp 的指令。 Cpp 在编译器开始工作之前通过包含所有指定的文件并扩展宏来重新组织文件。因此，宏是在编译器执行其工作之前发生的直接文本到文本替换。因此，它是一种更容易出错的工具，通常应该避免。这两种方法的主要共同点是它们允许对简单函数进行编码，这样就可以在没有函数调用的运行时开销的情况下使用它们，并且无需重复代码。以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 什么时候真正需要宏？ e 什么时候会内联函数或方法？ e 使用宏有哪些危险？氧

problems.titleEn: Question 7.4 - It is permissible to throw in a constructor in C++
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.4 - C++ 中可以引入构造函数吗
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: It is permissible to throw in a constructor in C++? Justify your answer.
problems.promptZh: C++ 中可以引入构造函数吗？证明你的答案合理。
problems.explanation:
This is a tricky one in that the community seems to be split between those who think it is wrong to throw in a constructor, and those who think it is silly not to. The best response is therefore to say that you know that there are varying opinions on this, and list the pros and cons, and then finish up with your opinion. The crucial fact to know is that if you throw in a constructor then the destructor for the object is not called. And it will never be called since the object will not exist after a throw during its construction. However, the destructor for each fully-constructed data member is called. If you are in the main part of the constructor that is within the curly brackets, then al] the data members are fully constructed and therefore destroyed. The main argument against throwing in a constructor is that the destructor will not be called, and therefore it will not do the clean-up that is usually done when the object is destroyed. For example, any memory allocated in the constructor will not be released. It is therefore OK to throw in a constructor provided you ensure that everything is properly destroyed and deallocated. The easiest way to do this is to use

smart pointers as data members instead of raw pointers. These will be destroyed on exit and will automatically carry out the required deallocations. If you make the rule of no throws in constructor, the problem is what do you do if some aspect of construction fails? Constructors do not have return values so you cannot return a failure code. You could create an extra method for every class that says whether construction was successful. Every time you construct an object, a test for success would then be required together with necessary remedial action. This would be rather painful. Here are some possible related questions: e In what order are the data members and bases of a class constructed? e What happens if you attempt to allocate an array bigger than there is memory available for? a

problems.explanationZh:
这是一个棘手的问题，因为社区似乎分为两派，一派认为引入构造函数是错误的，另一派则认为不这样做是愚蠢的。因此，最好的回应是说你知道对此有不同的意见，并列出优点和缺点，然后最后提出你的意见。要知道的关键事实是，如果您放入构造函数，则不会调用该对象的析构函数。并且它永远不会被调用，因为在构造过程中抛出后该对象将不存在。然而，每个完整构造的数据成员的析构函数都会被调用。如果您位于大括号内的构造函数的主要部分，则 al] 数据成员将被完全构造并因此被销毁。反对抛出构造函数的主要论点是析构函数不会被调用，因此它不会执行通常在对象被销毁时完成的清理工作。例如，在构造函数中分配的任何内存都不会被释放。因此，只要确保所有内容都被正确销毁和释放，就可以放入构造函数。最简单的方法是使用

7.3.解决方案将智能指针作为数据成员而不是原始指针。这些将在退出时被销毁，并自动执行所需的释放。如果你在构造函数中制定了禁止抛出的规则，那么问题是如果构造函数的某些方面失败了你该怎么办？构造函数没有返回值，因此您无法返回失败代码。您可以为每个类创建一个额外的方法来说明构建是否成功。每次构建一个对象时，都需要进行成功测试以及必要的补救措施。这样会比较痛苦。以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 类的数据成员和基类的构造顺序是什么？ e 如果您尝试分配一个大于可用内存的数组，会发生什么情况？一个

problems.titleEn: Question 7.5 - Is it permissible to throw in a destructor in C++
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.5 - C++ 中是否允许添加析构函数
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Is it permissible to throw in a destructor in C++? Justify your answer.
problems.promptZh: C++ 中是否允许添加析构函数？证明你的答案合理。
problems.explanation:
This is less controversial than the analagous question for a constructor, though you do get the odd contrarian. There are good reasons to never do this. The fundamental problem is that if two unhandled exceptions exist simultaneously then the C++ standard says that the application will terminate. If destructors are allowed to throw then it is very hard to avoid two happening at once: when an exception is thrown all automatic (i.e. ordinary) objects declared in the current scope are destroyed before the catch is executed. If any of their destructors can throw, you get two at once anda crash. So never ever throw in a destructor. Here are some possible related questions: e In what order are the destructors for data members and base classes called? Why is it done this way? e What does it mean for code to be exception safe? O

7. CODING IN C++
problems.explanationEn:

The fundamental problem is that if two unhandled exceptions exist simultaneously then the C++ standard says that the application will terminate. If destructors are allowed to throw then it is very hard to avoid two happening at once: when an exception is thrown all automatic (i.e. ordinary) objects declared in the current scope are destroyed before the catch is executed. If any of their destructors can throw, you get two at once anda crash. So never ever throw in a destructor. Here are some possible related questions: e In what order are the destructors for data members and base classes called? Why is it done this way? e What does it mean for code to be exception safe? O

7. CODING IN C++
problems.explanationZh:
尽管您确实遇到了奇怪的逆向投资者，但与构造函数的类似问题相比，这个问题的争议性较小。有充分的理由永远不要这样做。根本问题是，如果同时存在两个未处理的异常，则 C++ 标准表示应用程序将终止。如果允许抛出析构函数，那么很难避免同时发生两种情况：当抛出异常时，当前作用域中声明的所有自动（即普通）对象在执行 catch 之前都会被销毁。如果它们的任何一个析构函数可以抛出，那么您会同时得到两个并导致崩溃。所以永远不要抛出析构函数。以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 数据成员和基类的析构函数按什么顺序调用？为什么要这样做呢？ e 代码异常安全意味着什么？氧

7. C++ 编码

problems.titleEn: Question 7.6 - How would you copy a polymorphic object of unknown type
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.6 - 如何复制未知类型的多态对象
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: How would you copy a polymorphic object of unknown type?
problems.promptZh: 如何复制未知类型的多态对象？
problems.explanation: This is a standard problem and it is discussed at great length in [7]. The standard way to do this is by using a virtual constructor. Note that it is not possible to declare a standard constructor virtual but we can achieve the same effects by making a class method virtual. We therefore define in the base class virtual Base* clone() const =0; and in each inherited class virtual Inherited* clone() const \{ return new Inherited(*this); \} The crucial point here is that the inherited class knows its own type and so can copy itself without any problems. The return type is a pointer to an object of the class allocated on the heap since the type is unknown to the calling code. Note also that the return type is a pointer to the inherited class not the base class; this changing of return types is allowed when overriding in an inherited class. Here are some possible related questions: @ Would you use a smart pointer or a raw pointer as return type? e How would you manage the new object's life time? e Why not use the stack for the new object? a

The return type is a pointer to an object of the class allocated on the heap since the type is unknown to the calling code. Note also that the return type is a pointer to the inherited class not the base class; this changing of return types is allowed when overriding in an inherited class. Here are some possible related questions: @ Would you use a smart pointer or a raw pointer as return type? e How would you manage the new object's life time? e Why not use the stack for the new object? a

problems.titleEn: Question 7.7 - In C++, if a base class has a user-defined assignment operator, is one needed for an inherited class
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.7 - 在C++中，如果基类有用户定义的赋值运算符，继承类是否也需要一个
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: In C++, if a base class has a user-defined assignment operator, is one needed for an inherited class?
problems.promptZh: 在C++中，如果基类有用户定义的赋值运算符，继承类是否也需要一个？
problems.explanation:
The short answer is no! Unfortunately, the interviewer may be under the delusion that the answer is yes, so we need to be able to justify the answer.

If I have a class X inherited from Y and I code X a; Xb; a=b; without defining an assignment operator for X then the compiler uses the compiler-generated one. This calls the assignment operator for each base and member of X so whether Y has a user-defined operator or an implicit one does not matter. It would actually be a big flaw in the language if it did - changing an implementation detail of the base class should not require recoding of inherited classes. Here are some possible related questions: e Same question for copy constructor. e Suppose a data-member has a user-defined assignment operator, does this mean that the class needs one as well? O

It would actually be a big flaw in the language if it did - changing an implementation detail of the base class should not require recoding of inherited classes. 简短的回答是否定的！不幸的是，采访者可能误以为答案是肯定的，所以我们需要能够证明这个答案的合理性。

7.3.解决方案如果我有一个从Y继承的类X并且我编码X a; Xb; a=b;如果没有为 X 定义赋值运算符，则编译器将使用编译器生成的赋值运算符。这会为 X 的每个基数和成员调用赋值运算符，因此 Y 是否具有用户定义的运算符或隐式运算符并不重要。如果确实如此，这实际上将是该语言的一个大缺陷——更改基类的实现细节不应该需要重新编码继承的类。以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 复制构造函数的相同问题。 e 假设一个数据成员有一个用户定义的赋值运算符，这是否意味着该类也需要一个？氧

problems.titleEn: Question 7.8 - What is the C++ syntax to declare a function pointer
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.8 - 声明函数指针的 C++ 语法是什么
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: What is the C++ syntax to declare a function pointer?
problems.promptZh: 声明函数指针的 C++ 语法是什么？
problems.explanation:
To declare a pointer called “MyPointer' to a function returning an object of type A and taking in an object of type B, the syntax is A (*MyPointer) (B); Note the crucial parentheses around the name of the pointer and the “*.” If we want to assign the pointer to a function “MyFunction” then we might have A MyFunction(B);

7. CODING IN C++ void f() \{ A (*MyPointer) (B); MyPointer = &MyFunction; \} For further discussion, see Stroustrup Section 7.7, [18]. Here are some possible related questions: e If “MyFunction” takes in a constant reference to a B, can I do the assignment above? e What is the syntax if the function is a class data member? e Do you think function pointers are useful in C++? O

Here are some possible related questions: e If “MyFunction” takes in a constant reference to a B, can I do the assignment above? e What is the syntax if the function is a class data member? e Do you think function pointers are useful in C++? O

problems.titleEn: Question 7.9 - What do you know about C++ programming and finance
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.9 - 您对 C++ 编程和金融了解多少
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: What do you know about C++ programming and finance?
problems.promptZh: 您对 C++ 编程和金融了解多少？
problems.explanation:
Well, clearly there is no single right answer to this question. However, there is a clear wrong answer: “nothing.” The worst mistake to make, however, is to claim that you knowa lot on this topic when you don't. For example, one candidate on interview stated that he had implemented BGM in C++ but was unable to write a for loop when asked. An honest “I don't know any C++ but can program in another language and am keen to learn” is much better than pretending you know more than you do. However, you would do better to wait until you can honestly say that you know something. The best way to reach that point is to read books on C++ and finance (e.g. “C++ Design Patterns and Derivatives Pricing”), and to implement some models yourself. At the end of [6], there is a list of computer projects which you can work through. If you can go into an interview and say that you have done these in C++ and are able to discuss them, this will count for a lot. Be prepared for questions such as: e What did you find hard? e@ What did you find easy? e@ What was your class design for project X?

e What were you results for project Y? e How did doing the projects affect you understanding of C++? O

problems.titleEn: Question 7.10 - Virtual functions in C++
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.10 - C++ 中的虚函数
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: What is a virtual function?
problems.promptZh: 什么是虚函数？
problems.answer: A virtual function is a member function whose implementation is selected at run time according to the dynamic type of the object, enabling polymorphism through base-class pointers or references.
problems.answerEn: A virtual function is a member function whose implementation is selected at run time according to the dynamic type of the object, enabling polymorphism through base-class pointers or references.
problems.answerZh: 虚函数是一种成员函数，其具体实现会根据对象的动态类型在运行时选择；它使得通过基类指针或引用实现多态成为可能。
problems.manualContentReviewReason: C++ virtual-function question was incorrectly categorized as LeetCode and lacked a direct answer.

problems.titleEn: Question 7.11 - Implement strcmp
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.11 - 实现 strcmp
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Implement strcmp.
problems.promptZh: 实现 strcmp。
problems.explanation:
C-style strings are terminated by '\0'. The standard strcmp contract is to return a negative value if the first string is lexicographically smaller, zero if they are equal, and a positive value if it is larger.

The pointers point to const characters, but the pointer variables themselves can be advanced. Casting to unsigned char avoids surprises from implementations where plain char is signed.
problems.explanationEn:
C-style strings are terminated by '\0'. The standard strcmp contract is to return a negative value if the first string is lexicographically smaller, zero if they are equal, and a positive value if it is larger.

The pointers point to const characters, but the pointer variables themselves can be advanced. Casting to unsigned char avoids surprises from implementations where plain char is signed.
problems.explanationZh:
C 风格字符串以 '\0' 结尾。标准 strcmp 的约定是：若第一个字符串按字典序更小，返回负数；若相等，返回零；若更大，返回正数。

指针指向的是 const 字符，但指针变量本身可以向后移动。转换为 unsigned char 可以避免某些实现中普通 char 为有符号类型而带来的问题。
problems.manualContentReviewReason: strcmp implementation had corrupted null characters and empty answer fields.

problems.titleEn: Question 7.12 - What is a virtual destructor and when is it needed
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.12 - 什么是虚拟析构函数以及何时需要它
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: What is a virtual destructor and when is it needed?
problems.promptZh: 什么是虚拟析构函数以及何时需要它？
problems.explanation: If one has an object of some inherited class that has been dynamically allocated (i.e. created using new, ) then when it is deleted via a pointer to a base class object, one has the issue that the correct destructor needs to be called. If the destructor of the base class is virtual, then the inherited class one is called directly and there is no problem. If it is not virtual, then the base class destructor is called and the object may not be properly deleted. This generally causes a memory leak and may cause worse problems. As a general rule, always declare destructors virtual if any method is pure abstract, i.e. not defined in the base class. Some compilers, e.g. g++, generate a warning if you do not declare the destructor virtual in this case. Generally declare them virtual if any method is virtual. If no method is virtual it probably is not necessary. Here are some possible related questions: e What are the disadvantages if any of declaring a destructor virtual? e Do you think that C++ should simply default to making all destructors virtual? O
problems.explanationEn: If one has an object of some inherited class that has been dynamically allocated (i.e. created using new, ) then when it is deleted via a pointer to a base class object, one has the issue that the correct destructor needs to be called. If the destructor of the base class is virtual, then the inherited class one is called directly and there is no problem. If it is not virtual, then the base class destructor is called and the object may not be properly deleted. This generally causes a memory leak and may cause worse problems. As a general rule, always declare destructors virtual if any method is pure abstract, i.e. not defined in the base class. Some compilers, e.g. g++, generate a warning if you do not declare the destructor virtual in this case. Generally declare them virtual if any method is virtual. If no method is virtual it probably is not necessary. Here are some possible related questions: e What are the disadvantages if any of declaring a destructor virtual? e Do you think that C++ should simply default to making all destructors virtual? O
problems.explanationZh: 如果一个继承类的对象是动态分配的（即使用 new 创建的），那么当通过指向基类对象的指针删除它时，就会遇到需要调用正确的析构函数的问题。如果基类的析构函数是virtual的，那么直接调用继承类的析构函数是没有问题的。如果它不是虚拟的，则调用基类析构函数，并且该对象可能无法正确删除。这通常会导致内存泄漏，并可能导致更严重的问题。作为一般规则，如果任何方法是纯抽象的（即未在基类中定义），请始终将析构函数声明为 virtual。一些编译器，例如g++，如果在这种情况下未将析构函数声明为 virtual，则会生成警告。如果任何方法是虚拟的，通常将它们声明为虚拟的。如果没有虚拟方法，则可能没有必要。以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 将析构函数声明为虚拟有什么缺点？ e 您是否认为 C++ 应该默认将所有析构函数设为虚拟？氧

problems.titleEn: Question 7.13 - If a class B is derived from class A and contains an object of class C, in which order are the constructors/destructors called for an object of type B
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.13 - 如果类 B 派生自类 A 并包含类 C 的对象，则为类型 B 的对象调用构造函数/析构函数的顺序如下
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: If a class B is derived from class A and contains an object of class C, in which order are the constructors/destructors called for an object of type B.
problems.promptZh: 如果类 B 派生自类 A 并包含类 C 的对象，则为类型 B 的对象调用构造函数/析构函数的顺序如下。
problems.explanation:
The basic rule is the more fundamental something is, the sooner it is constructed and the later it is destructed. The reason for this is that an inherited class may want to use the base class during either construction or destruction, but the converse will never be true. NB if you attempt to use the inherited class via a virtual function during base class construction you will come to grief. If the function is pure virtual you will get a run-time error saying you called a pure virtual function. If it is not, the base class version will be called. So in this particular case, A is constructed then C then B. And for destruction, B then C then A. Note that this means the class data members are available in the constructor and destructor of B.

7. CODING IN C++ Here are some possible related questions: e Inaclass with several data members, in what order are they constructed? © In a class with several data members, in what order are they destroyed? O
problems.explanationEn:
The basic rule is the more fundamental something is, the sooner it is constructed and the later it is destructed. The reason for this is that an inherited class may want to use the base class during either construction or destruction, but the converse will never be true. NB if you attempt to use the inherited class via a virtual function during base class construction you will come to grief. If the function is pure virtual you will get a run-time error saying you called a pure virtual function. If it is not, the base class version will be called. So in this particular case, A is constructed then C then B. And for destruction, B then C then A. Note that this means the class data members are available in the constructor and destructor of B.

7. CODING IN C++ Here are some possible related questions: e Inaclass with several data members, in what order are they constructed? © In a class with several data members, in what order are they destroyed? O
problems.explanationZh:
基本规律是越是根本的东西，越早被构建，越晚被破坏。原因是继承类可能希望在构造或销毁期间使用基类，但反之则不然。注意，如果您在基类构造期间尝试通过虚函数使用继承的类，您将会陷入困境。如果该函数是纯虚函数，您将收到运行时错误，指出您调用了纯虚函数。如果不是，则将调用基类版本。因此，在这种特殊情况下，先构造 A，然后构造 C，然后构造 B。对于销毁，先构造 B，然后构造 C，然后构造 A。请注意，这意味着类数据成员在 B 的构造函数和析构函数中可用。

7. C++ 中的编码 以下是一些可能的相关问题： e Inaclass 有多个数据成员，它们按什么顺序构造？ © 在具有多个数据成员的类中，它们按什么顺序被销毁？氧

problems.titleEn: Question 7.14 - What does every class come equipped with
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.14 - 每个班级都配备了什么
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: What does every class come equipped with?
problems.promptZh: 每个班级都配备了什么？
problems.explanation: The compiler will always provide a copy constructor, an assignment operator and a destructor. It is important to realize that these are trivial in the sense that they do the simplest thing they can. The copy constructor therefore calls the copy constructor of each data member to make a copy. This is called making a shallow copy. The assignment operator calls the assignment operator of each data member. It is OK to use the shallow copy if every data member has a copy constructor that does the right thing. This is generally not the case if data members are pointers, since both old and new objects will point to the same data. This can result in crashes when the pointed-to object is deleted twice. The same issues apply with assignment operators. A non-trivial destructor is needed if and only if the class needs to free resources when the object dies. This is typically deleting allocated memory. A trivial destructor should be declared virtual if the object is likely to be deleted via a pointer to a base class. The best way to get round declaring non-trivial copy constructors, destructors and assignment operators is to use smart pointers that do all the correct things when the default behaviour is used. This has been dubbed (by Mark Joshi) “the rule of almost zero.” Here are some possible related questions: e@ What is “the rule of three”? e What smart pointers have you used? @ What would you do if you wanted it to be impossible to copy objects from a class? O

O
problems.explanationZh:
编译器总是提供复制构造函数、赋值运算符和析构函数。重要的是要认识到，这些都是微不足道的，因为它们做了尽可能简单的事情。因此，复制构造函数调用每个数据成员的复制构造函数来进行复制。这称为制作浅拷贝。赋值运算符调用每个数据成员的赋值运算符。如果每个数据成员都有一个执行正确操作的复制构造函数，则可以使用浅复制。如果数据成员是指针，则通常不会出现这种情况，因为旧对象和新对象都将指向相同的数据。当指向的对象被删除两次时，这可能会导致崩溃。同样的问题也适用于赋值运算符。当且仅当类需要在对象死亡时释放资源时，才需要一个重要的析构函数。这通常是删除分配的内存。如果对象可能通过指向基类的指针删除，则应将普通析构函数声明为虚拟。避免声明重要的复制构造函数、析构函数和赋值运算符的最佳方法是使用智能指针，该指针在使用默认行为时可以执行所有正确的操作。这被（马克·乔希）称为“几乎为零的规则”。以下是一些可能的相关问题： e@ 什么是“三法则”？ e 您使用过哪些智能指针？ @如果您希望不可能从类中复制对象，您会怎么做？氧

7.3.解决方案

problems.titleEn: Question 7.15 - In what two ways can an object of type A be automatically converted into an object of type B in C++
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.15 - C++中A类型的对象可以通过哪两种方式自动转换为B类型的对象
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: In what two ways can an object of type A be automatically converted into an object of type B in C++?
problems.promptZh: C++中A类型的对象可以通过哪两种方式自动转换为B类型的对象？
problems.explanation:
The first and best-known method relies on the fact that if a class has a single argument constructor then the compiler will treat it as a conversion operator. So the class declaration for B contains the line BC const A& myObject); or B(myObject); either is sufficient for automatic conversion. Another method is needed if we wish to be able to convert into objects of type B when the class declaration is not accessible, for example, suppose B was the type double: we cannot write a new constructor for doubles. This is done by defining an operator in the class A whose name is B so we include the line operator B() const; in the class declaration for A. When we define the operator, we code it as B::operator A() const \{ // create object of type B and return it \} In both cases, we do NOT specify the operator's return type at the start of the line. For further discussion, see Section 11.4 of [18].

7. CODING IN C++ Here are some possible related questions: e What does the explicit keyword do? e Do you think that constructors should be explicit by default? Why do you think the standard does it the way it does? e Can you give a non-trivial example where the second methodology is useful? a)

This is done by defining an operator in the class A whose name is B so we include the line operator B() const; in the class declaration for A. 7. CODING IN C++ Here are some possible related questions: e What does the explicit keyword do? e Do you think that constructors should be explicit by default? Why do you think the standard does it the way it does? e Can you give a non-trivial example where the second methodology is useful? a)
problems.explanationZh:
第一个也是最著名的方法依赖于这样一个事实：如果一个类具有单个参数构造函数，那么编译器会将其视为转换运算符。因此 B 的类声明包含行 BC const A& myObject);或 B(myObject) ；任何一个都足以进行自动转换。如果我们希望在类声明不可访问时能够转换为 B 类型的对象，则需要另一种方法，例如，假设 B 是 double 类型：我们无法为 double 编写新的构造函数。这是通过在类 A 中定义一个名为 B 的运算符来完成的，因此我们包含了行运算符 B() const;在 A 的类声明中。当我们定义运算符时，我们将其编码为 B::operator A() const \{ // create object of type B and return it \} 在这两种情况下，我们都不会在行的开头指定运算符的返回类型。如需进一步讨论，请参阅 [18] 的第 11.4 节。

7. C++ 中的编码 以下是一些可能的相关问题： e 显式关键字有什么作用？ e 您认为默认情况下构造函数应该是显式的吗？您认为该标准为什么会这样做？ e 您能举一个重要的例子来说明第二种方法有用吗？一个）

problems.titleEn: Question 7.16 - Why does a class that uses memory allocation need a properly written copy constructor and assignment operator
problems.titleZh: 问题 7.16 - 为什么使用内存分配的类需要正确编写的复制构造函数和赋值运算符
tags: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.sourceUrl: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.bookName: 红宝书 Quant Job Interview Questions And Answers
problems.promptEn: Why does a class that uses memory allocation need a properly written copy constructor and assignment operator?
problems.promptZh: 为什么使用内存分配的类需要正确编写的复制构造函数和赋值运算符？
problems.explanation:
If a class uses memory allocation then it will use the new command. This returns a pointer to a piece of dynamically allocated memory. If we make the pointer a class data member, then the operations of copying and assignment will cause issues if we use the compiler's default operators. In particular, the copy constructor supplied by the compiler will be a “shallow” copy constructor, that is it will simply make a copy of the pointer. The effect of this is that the original object and the copy will point to the same piece of allocated memory. This will cause many problems. For example, a properly written object should delete the pointed-to memory in its destructor if not before. A shallow copy will cause this to happen twice, and a crash will result. More generally, even if the deletion is handled correctly in some other way, the two objects will be strongly tied together and the behaviour will not be that of a copying an ordinary object. The issues with assignment are similar, plus there is an additional complication that the object being overwritten will lose its pointer to the memory it had previously allocated. This means that that memory will never be deallocated and a memory leak occurs. Some additional points to note on this problem are that the class will also need a properly written destructor and that many of the problems can be avoided by using smart pointers. It is also worth mentioning at this point “the rule of three”: if a class has one of a destructor, copy constructor and assignment operator, it generally needs all three. Personally, I prefer the “rule of almost zero”: a class should have none of the three except an empty virtual destructor when it has abstract methods. The reason for this is that memory allocation and deallocation is much better handled

by smart pointers. Write (or find in Boost) once a smart pointer class that has the desired behaviours, and then use and reuse that. This is a lot less bug prone and takes a lot less time when writing new classes. For more on the rule of almost zero see the second edition of [7]. Here are some possible related questions: e What smart pointers do you know? e@ Why do abstract classes need virtual destructors? OJ
